commentary_text: The market is substantially more confident in an Ivory Coast win, pricing it at 83% versus the model's 64%—a 19-point gap—while also compressing the Curaçao win probability to 5% from 12%. Both sources rank Ivory Coast as heavy favorite, but sportsbooks and Polymarket are pricing a more lopsided matchup. This tightening could reflect recent form, injury status, or lineup changes that have become public since the model's last update; the model operates on structural ratings alone and cannot see breaking news on squad availability or recent results. The dashboard flags this as a meaningful signal worth monitoring, though it remains uncertain whether the market's sharper conviction reflects genuine new information or simply tighter price discovery.
